title: Modes, Padding, Malleability, and Legacy Decryption · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible mode failure laboratory and migration adapter with one primitive, parameter, nonce, context, key, parser, trust, timing, migration, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in mode failure laboratory and migration adapter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Demonstrate deterministic block-pattern leakage and prohibit ECB for application messages.
Trace CBC chaining, IV requirements, padding validation, malleability, and oracle behavior as a legacy risk.
Trace CTR keystream generation and prove that key-counter reuse destroys confidentiality and enables malleation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Ecb Pattern Leak
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug cryptographic engineering team handles case 6674 during a post-quantum compatibility canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject ECB and unauthenticated modes while containing CBC or CTR to uniform decrypt-only migration; retain exact canonical bytes, purpose, role, version, and artifact identity; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Demonstrate deterministic block-pattern leakage and prohibit ECB for application messages.

Inspect the Crypto Go Ecb Pattern Leak trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Ecb Pattern Leak.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for demonstrate deterministic block-pattern leakage and prohibit ecb for application messages. For Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go Ecb Pattern Leak, keep Crypto Go Ecb Pattern Leak connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
